# src/controllers/generated

**DO NOT EDIT files in this directory.**

All files here are auto-generated by `npm run generate:crud` and will be
overwritten on every run.

To override behaviour, edit the **sidecar controller** one level up:

```
src/controllers/<table>.ts   ← yours to edit (re-exports generated, override methods here)
```

The generated route already imports from the sidecar, so your overrides take
effect automatically.

To change what is generated, edit the generator template:
```
scripts/generate-crud.ts
```
